title: Personal Worlds
description: Create your own Void or Flat World of your dreams with almost everything customizable!
body:
Personal Worlds is an Mod which allows Players to create their own Void or Flat World of their dreams with alot of things being customizable.
Current list of features include:

- Own definable list for allowed blocks and biomes to be used for the world
- Own creation of an list of standard block presets the player can choose from as well for flat worlds
- Highly customizable world settings to control/allow things like custom sky color, day/night cycle, vegetation, trees generation, hostile and passive mob spawn, and weather

NOTE: This Mod also requires CodeChickenLib! Get it from [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/codechicken-lib-1-8](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/codechicken-lib-1-8)

Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/TNdCD9CHuk) if you need help with issues or create an issue on the issue tracker mentioned above.
